name: Buffer Underwrite ('Buffer Underflow')
description: The product writes to a buffer using an index or pointer that references a memory location before the beginning of the buffer, corrupting data in adjacent lower memory addresses.
detection_pattern: TRANSFORM[index_calculation] produces a negative index or a pointer decremented below the buffer base address, which is used to write to STORAGE[buffer] without a CONTROL[lower_bounds_check] that validates the index/pointer is >= 0 or >= buffer start
